jobs.prompt: Studio portrait reference card, photorealistic 3D CGI render, DAZ Studio Iray style: head-and-shoulders portrait of an original character — a 22-year-old American woman, honey-blonde hair pulled into a high glossy ponytail with a gold scrunchie, a few loose strands at the temples, bright green eyes, light freckles across the nose and cheekbones, soft square face with a warm confident smile, coral-pink lips, subtle athletic glow. Dead-front symmetrical framing, neutral expression-forward look, plain mid-grey studio cyclorama, even soft lighting. No text, no logos. Photographic CGI render, NOT illustrated, NOT anime.

Full-body studio reference card, photorealistic 3D CGI render, DAZ Studio Iray style: the SAME woman as the attached face reference — same honey-blonde high ponytail, same green eyes, same freckles — standing front-full with hands relaxed at her sides, slim athletic cheerleader build. She wears an ORIGINAL pro-am squad uniform: deep-teal sleeveless shell top with gold double-stripe trim at collar and armholes, white side panels, a gold comet-streak emblem on the chest with NO letters, a sunray-pleated skirt in teal, gold and white worn over WHITE brief shorts (white only, never colored) for full coverage, white cheer shoes with gold laces. At the far right a solid matte-grey THREE-DIMENSIONAL mannequin figure of a 6-foot-2 man for scale — a sculpted 3D mannequin form, NOT an outline, NOT a drawing. She is 5 feet 6 inches tall; the mannequin is 6 feet 2 inches tall: she is exactly 89% of the mannequin's height, a full 8 inches (20 cm) shorter. The TOP OF HER HEAD is level with the mannequin's CHIN — one faint horizontal grid line passes exactly through both the mannequin's CHIN and the TOP OF HER HEAD. Both stand on the same floor line at the same distance from the camera. They are NOT the same height; their eye levels do NOT match. Faint horizontal grid lines across the background. Plain mid-grey studio cyclorama, even lighting. No text, no words, no logos. Photographic CGI render, NOT illustrated.

Four tall stadium light masts (lights off), clear warm late-afternoon sky with long soft shadows. NO people anywhere in the frame. NO yard numbers, NO numerals painted on the grass or the track, NO lane numbers. No benches, no pylons, no hurdles. No buildings, press boxes, sheds, or parking lots inside the fence line. No text, no words, no logos, no signage. Photographic CGI render, NOT illustrated.
